blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Right when he was turning to walk away.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Aight. Keep your head up in the hallways this week. I'll know if something's off.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He doesn't let things go. That's his problem — he holds everything like it's a debt.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You saw the whole thing though. You good?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I feel it. I just don't let it live on my face.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Same way you run a route. You practice keeping the fear on the inside until it turns into something else.
I thought about that walking to practice. The fear on the inside until it turns into something else.
